eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Juab, UT; at 8:31 PM on JUN 26, 2026 Effective until 8:31 PM JUN 27, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Juab Co. Emergency Management: Maple Fire. Mandatory evacuation for Mammoth, Silver City, and Eureka. Life-threatening, fast-changing conditions. Leave now and avoid the area. Juab Co. Emergency Management: Maple Fire Fire, EVACUATE NOW for  Mammoth, Silver City, and Eureka Leave immediately by the designated route. Take only what you have already prepared by the door. Do not stop to gather additional belongings. Help neighbors leave if it is safe to do so. Keep listening to local news and cell phone alerts. Evacuation Routes: East: Take SR-6 through Eureka South: Travel toward Delta
